name: Nava Benefits
tagline: AI-powered benefits brokerage platform for modern HR teams
description: Nava Benefits combines AI technology with expert benefits advisors to help companies optimize their employee benefits programs. Nava HQ, its AI-powered platform, analyzes benefits data, benchmarks plans against industry standards, models cost scenarios, and provides employees with AI-assisted benefits guidance. The platform helps HR teams make data-driven benefits decisions that balance cost and employee satisfaction.
cons: Brokerage model may not fit all
